Dear Sirs,

Re: Facility Agreement dated 12 March 2024 between Northwind Manufacturing
Group Ltd. and the Lenders party thereto (Agreement Reference: FA-2024-0091)

We write to confirm that, at the request of the Borrower and further to the
resolution of the Required Lenders, the Facility Agent hereby grants a waiver
in respect of the leverage ratio covenant (Covenant Reference: COV-LEV-01)
for the testing period ended 30 September 2026.

The waiver is granted on the basis that the covenant breach arose from a
one-off restructuring charge unrelated to the Borrower's ongoing trading
performance, as evidenced by the management accounts submitted on 15
October 2026.

This waiver is effective as of 20 October 2026 and applies solely to the
testing period referenced above.

Yours faithfully,
Facility Agent
